title: Only Smart People Like Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Only Smart People Like Evangelion?             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Thu Sep 09, 2004 6:46 pm I noticed that only Smart/Crazy people like evangelion is it just me?

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Thu Sep 09, 2004 6:55 pm i don't know anyone else other than the people on this and another fourm that like EVA and i don't know any physically so i don't know

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Sep 09, 2004 6:57 pm Um... yes. Of course. Only smart people like Evangelion! Wheee! I'm smart!!

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Sep 09, 2004 6:59 pm I noticed that only Smart/Crazy people like evangelion is it just me?

[]:             Quote Post by belial11737 » Thu Sep 09, 2004 7:09 pm nah, nah you r all wrong...I know a few people who only like evangelion cuz of the cool mechas and action scenes ( which means they skip all the "boring" episodes in which there is character development)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 09, 2004 7:15 pm I've observed on a whole, that people either really hate Eva, or really like Eva. And of those that like it, people are either really intellectual and mature, or really immature and at times god awful stupid. So, no, Eva fans aren't really smart by any measure, I find for every intellectual and mature fan, there's one stupid immature fan to negate the intelligence on a whole. Although, as Gollum stated in Kojiro Abe's skit: "Evangelion is for smart, sophisticated people and teenage boys with sexual problems, not stupid mentally handicapped bloodthirsty teenage jocks!!"

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Thu Sep 09, 2004 7:20 pm I love Eva. I think I'm smart... ...yeah, I'm smart. Really! I AM! ...okay...I'm not... :oops: ...but, I love Eva. Nuff Said. :)

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Thu Sep 09, 2004 8:31 pm Hahaha. We're all a bunch of dumbasses.

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Thu Sep 09, 2004 10:48 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Although, as Gollum stated in Kojiro Abe's skit: "Evangelion is for smart, sophisticated people and teenage boys with sexual problems, not stupid mentally handicapped bloodthirsty teenage jocks!!"

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Fri Sep 10, 2004 1:59 am You raise a very good point. Perhaps Evangelion is the worst anime series ever and only dumb people like it.

[]:             Quote Post by Vulkurt » Fri Sep 10, 2004 8:54 am I think with any given thing, you have a wide spectrum of the relative intelligence of those consuming. And, you have to take into acount the bell-curve distrubution of intelligence in any given community. People can make dumb comments regarding, say, the Theory of Relativity, but other people can make insightful comments on Suvivor .

[]:             Quote Post by ShoKenju » Fri Sep 10, 2004 9:04 am only intelligent people understand evangelion. the ignorant will just be in awe at its complexity. unless your just to retarded to finish the series

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Fri Sep 10, 2004 12:27 pm When I wuz smart I uset to watch Evanjellyon but now I watch Stellvia. --Charly I'm sorry; I lifted that joke from an old issue of NATIONAL LAMPOON.

[]:             Quote Post by Invincible Kaji » Fri Sep 10, 2004 3:41 pm I eat children.

[]: Wow             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Fri Sep 10, 2004 4:07 pm ~I dident think that this many people would reply to my sugestion and stuff like that ~I do thinks its for SMART people tho because when i tried showing my friend who i would say is the modern stupid arogant teen and he dident like it. ~Has anyone heard or possibley read one of Orson Scott Card's books? ~thank you for stateing you opinion

[]: Re: Wow             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Fri Sep 10, 2004 4:40 pm Dark FireStar wrote: ~I dident think that this many people would reply to my sugestion and stuff like that ~I do thinks its for SMART people tho because when i tried showing my friend who i would say is the modern stupid arogant teen and he dident like it.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Sep 10, 2004 4:52 pm I often have to deal with the appearance that I am intellectually superior to almost everyone I come face-to-face with in my day-to-day life (except for some of you, but then that isn't face-to-face), but then my thought process natrually brings me to this: if I were really all that intelligent, would I be spending so much time on messageboards talking about a television show? Wouldn't it be a better testament to any prowress I might have if I were to actually use this time to do something more productive? Does it say something about my internal capbilities that the best idea I can come up with in the absence of mandatory activity (even in its presence) is to go online and see what someone else has to say about something that usually means absolutely donkey dingle? Then I have beer, and the ugly smarts fly away. Thank you, Jesus.

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Fri Sep 10, 2004 5:05 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: I often have to deal with the appearance that I am intellectually superior to almost everyone I come face-to-face with in my day-to-day life (except for some of you, but then that isn't face-to-face), but then my thought process natrually brings me to this: if I were really all that intelligent, would I be spending so much time on messageboards talking about a television show? Wouldn't it be a better testament to any prowress I might have if I were to actually use this time to do something more productive? Does it say something about my internal capbilities that the best idea I can come up with in the absence of mandatory activity (even in its presence) is to go online and see what someone else has to say about something that usually means absolutely donkey dingle? Then I have beer, and the ugly smarts fly away. Thank you, Jesus.

[]: Nowhere to go             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Fri Sep 10, 2004 5:12 pm I dont want to say that im smarter than most teenagers so not to gloat or whatever, but yeah its hard to find someone intellagent enough where i live so i come on the boards to speak with other highly intelligent, slightly insane people. So in other words this is where i use the other 75% of my brain thats not used in school. thats about it

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Fri Sep 10, 2004 6:57 pm coff wrote: Hahaha. We're all a bunch of dumbasses.
